introduction: SYNOPSISOwing to his father's inheritance, Young-nam, a college junior, lives well along with his widowed mother, Mrs. Park, and his brother, Young-kil. However, Young-nam has no interest in his family. He just likes to ride his motorcycle. When he meets Mi-suk, Young-nam becomes a fiery youth. Then a hustler named Dok-su seduces Mrs. Park. Eyeing the fortune, Dok-su becomes Young-kil's piano teacher and meets Mrs. Park secretly. But Young-nam's friend witnesses one of their meetings. He tells Young-nam who proceeds to beat up Dok-su and flees to the mountains. Subsequently, Mrs. Park realizes her mistake and finds Young-nam. She has him come back home when Dok-su also reappears. Getting rid of Dok-su, Young-nam ends up running on an endless road.故事三年级的岭南大学是不是一个致富和现场bakyeosa寡居的母亲，哥哥，父亲younggil文物回家兴趣日元，骑摩托车的快感发现bultaeunda涉世未深的青少年。但jebijok doksu诱惑bakyeosa，在酒店配备了钢琴老师younggil怒视是bakyeosa秘密恋情与他们没有doeja见证了纳姆·纳姆遭受重创的doksu的朋友。
